basic_details.job_title: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 210 Anganwadi Workers and Helper Posts in Chandauli District
basic_details.short_information: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 has been announced by the Office of the District Programme Officer, Child Development, Chandauli through an official notification (Vigyapti) dated 04 July 2026. This recruitment drive invites online applications from eligible female candidates for the honorarium-based posts of Anganwadi Karyakatri (Worker) and Anganwadi Sahayika (Helper) across the rural and urban areas of Chandauli district, Uttar Pradesh. A total of 84 Karyakatri posts and 126 Sahayika posts are vacant across 10 child development projects in the district. Interested and eligible candidates can a

important_dates.raw: Notification Released: 04 July 2026 Age Cut-off Date: 01 July 2026 Online Application Start Date: As per departmental website upanganwadibharti.in Last Date to Apply Online: 25 July 2026 (till 12:00 midnight) Offline Applications: Not accepted under any circumstances

application_fee.details: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika recruitment 2026. Candidates should check the online application portal, upanganwadibharti.in, at the time of filling the form for confirmed and updated fee details, if any.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Cut-off Date: 01 July 2026 No age relaxation is applicable to any caste category.

qualification.details: Only female candidates are eligible to apply for these posts. The candidate must be a permanent resident of the Gram Sabha/Ward (urban area) where the vacant post exists. The Gram Sabha includes all revenue villages, majra, purva, and tolas that fall under it. If an eligible candidate belonging to the notified category is not available within the Gram Sabha, an eligible candidate from the concerned Nyay Panchayat will be selected instead.

salary_details.details: The posts of Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika are honorarium-based (मानदेय आधारित) appointments and not regular salaried government jobs. The official notification does not specify the exact honorarium amount. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed vacancy notice displayed at the CDPO office, Vikas Bhawan, or the official website upanganwadibharti.in, or the government order dated 17 September 2025 for the applicable honorarium structure.

selection_process: Selection to the posts of Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika will be made on the basis of a merit list prepared as per the criteria mentioned in the Government Order No. /2025/3313/58-1-2025 (1917687) dated 17 September 2025
for merit purposes) Residency of the applicant in the relevant Gram Sabha/Ward Reservation category (UR/OBC/SC/ST) Priority rules for BPL widow
BPL and APL candidates as applicable
how_to_apply: Visit the official departmental website: upanganwadibharti.in
Locate the notification for Chandauli Anganwadi Karyakatri/Sahayika Recruitment 2026-27.
Register using your basic details and create login credentials.
Fill in the online application form carefully with personal, educational, and residential details.
Upload the scanned copies of all required documents and photograph as specified.
Review the filled application form thoroughly to avoid errors.
Submit the application form before the last date, i.e., 25 July 2026, midnight 12:00.
Save or print the confirmation/acknowledgment for future reference.
important_instructions: Selection for the posts of Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika will follow a defined order of preference among eligible resident candidates of the same Gram Sabha/Ward:

Widow women living Below Poverty Line (BPL) will be given first priority. A valid death certificate issued by the Gram Panchayat Officer/concerned urban body and an attested copy of the family register will be required. If a BPL widow is not available, preference will go to a BPL divorced/abandoned (Parityakta) woman. A valid legal order from the competent court is required in such cases. If candidates from both the above categories are not available, preference will be given to a BPL candidate, followed by an APL (Above Poverty Line) candidate.

Only income certificates issued by a competent authority (Tehsildar), as per UP Government Order No. 3959/1-9-11-Raj-9 dated 30 September 2011, that are online-verifiable will be accepted. As per the redefined poverty line income limits (Government Order dated 14 September 2015), the annual income limit is Rs. 46,080 for rural areas and Rs. 56,460 for urban areas. BPL/Antyodaya ration cards will not be accepted as proof of poverty status.

Only applications submitted online through upanganwadibharti.in within the prescribed period will be accepted. Offline applications will not be accepted or considered. Two candidates/women from the same family will not be selected at one Anganwadi center. Applications containing errors or incomplete information will not be considered. For more information regarding the recruitment process, candidates may contact the District Programme Officer office (near Vikas Bhawan, G.T. Road, Bichhiyakala, Chandauli) or the respective Block Child Development Project Officer (CDPO) office on working days. Detailed project-wise, Gram Panchayat-wise, and ward-wise vacancy and reservation details are displayed on notice boards at the Collectorate, Vikas Bhawan, Tehsil, Development Block, CDPO office, and DPO office.

rows.details: Office of the District Programme Officer, Child Development, Chandauli (Bal Vikas Chandauli)

content_sections.heading: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Released: 04 July 2026 Age Cut-off Date: 01 July 2026 Online Application Start Date: As per departmental website upanganwadibharti.in Last Date to Apply Online: 25 July 2026 (till 12:00 midnight) Offline Applications: Not accepted under any circumstances

content_sections.heading: Chandauli Anganwadi Vacancy Details 2026 (Project-wise)
content_sections.text: The recruitment notification mentions that this vacancy arose after 16 Anganwadi Sahayikas were promoted to the post of Anganwadi Karyakatri, following approval by the District Magistrate dated 02 July 2026, as per Government Order No. /2025/3313/58-1-2025 (1917687) dated 17 September 2025. The department has clarified that the number of vacancies shown below may increase, decrease, or change based on the departmental status at the time of final selection. Note: The complete project-wise, Gram Panchayat-wise and ward-wise vacancy details along with full reservation and eligibility information have been displayed on the notice boards of the District Collectorate, Vikas Bhawan, Tehsil, Development Block, Child Development Project Officer offices and the District Programme Officer office of Chandauli, and are also uploaded on upanganwadibharti.in.

content_sections.heading: Chandauli Anganwadi Bharti 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Only female candidates are eligible to apply for these posts. The candidate must be a permanent resident of the Gram Sabha/Ward (urban area) where the vacant post exists. The Gram Sabha includes all revenue villages, majra, purva, and tolas that fall under it. If an eligible candidate belonging to the notified category is not available within the Gram Sabha, an eligible candidate from the concerned Nyay Panchayat will be selected instead.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Honorarium for Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika
content_sections.text: The posts of Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika are honorarium-based (मानदेय आधारित) appointments and not regular salaried government jobs. The official notification does not specify the exact honorarium amount. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed vacancy notice displayed at the CDPO office, Vikas Bhawan, or the official website upanganwadibharti.in, or the government order dated 17 September 2025 for the applicable honorarium structure.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika recruitment 2026. Candidates should check the online application portal, upanganwadibharti.in, at the time of filling the form for confirmed and updated fee details, if any.

content_sections.heading: Preference / Priority Rules in Selection
content_sections.text: Selection for the posts of Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika will follow a defined order of preference among eligible resident candidates of the same Gram Sabha/Ward: Widow women living Below Poverty Line (BPL) will be given first priority. A valid death certificate issued by the Gram Panchayat Officer/concerned urban body and an attested copy of the family register will be required. If a BPL widow is not available, preference will go to a BPL divorced/abandoned (Parityakta) woman. A valid legal order from the competent court is required in such cases. If candidates from both the above categories are not available, preference will be given to a BPL candidate, followed by an APL (Above Poverty Line) candidate. Only income certificates issued by a competent authority (Tehsildar), as per UP Government Order No. 3959/1-9-11-Raj-9 dated 30 September 2011, that are online-verifiable will be accepted. As per the redefined poverty line income limits (Government Order dated 14 September 2015), the annual income limit is Rs. 46,080 for rural areas and Rs. 56,460 for urban areas. BPL/Antyodaya ration cards will not be accepted as proof of poverty status.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection to the posts of Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika will be made on the basis of a merit list prepared as per the criteria mentioned in the Government Order No. /2025/3313/58-1-2025 (1917687) dated 17 September 2025, considering: Educational qualification (up to postgraduate level, for merit purposes) Residency of the applicant in the relevant Gram Sabha/Ward Reservation category (UR/OBC/SC/ST) Priority rules for BPL widow, BPL divorced/abandoned woman, BPL and APL candidates as applicable

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets Residence certificate (issued online with digital signature from Tehsil) Caste certificate (issued online with digital signature from Tehsil, where applicable) Income certificate issued by Tehsildar (online-verifiable) Death certificate of husband and family register copy (for widow candidates) Court order/legal document (for divorced/abandoned candidates) Recent passport-size photograph Valid mobile number and email ID for registration

content_sections.heading: How to Apply Online for UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official departmental website: upanganwadibharti.in Locate the notification for Chandauli Anganwadi Karyakatri/Sahayika Recruitment 2026-27. Register using your basic details and create login credentials. Fill in the online application form carefully with personal, educational, and residential details. Upload the scanned copies of all required documents and photograph as specified. Review the filled application form thoroughly to avoid errors. Submit the application form before the last date, i.e., 25 July 2026, midnight 12:00. Save or print the confirmation/acknowledgment for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Candidates
content_sections.text: Only applications submitted online through upanganwadibharti.in within the prescribed period will be accepted. Offline applications will not be accepted or considered. Two candidates/women from the same family will not be selected at one Anganwadi center. Applications containing errors or incomplete information will not be considered. For more information regarding the recruitment process, candidates may contact the District Programme Officer office (near Vikas Bhawan, G.T. Road, Bichhiyakala, Chandauli) or the respective Block Child Development Project Officer (CDPO) office on working days. Detailed project-wise, Gram Panchayat-wise, and ward-wise vacancy and reservation details are displayed on notice boards at the Collectorate, Vikas Bhawan, Tehsil, Development Block, CDPO office, and DPO office.

faq.question: Q1. What is UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 for Chandauli?
faq.answer: It is an official recruitment drive by the District Programme Officer, Child Development, Chandauli to fill 84 Anganwadi Karyakatri and 126 Anganwadi Sahayika honorarium-based posts across 10 projects in the district.

faq.question: Q2. Who can apply for Chandauli Anganwadi Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: Only female candidates who are permanent residents of the concerned Gram Sabha or Ward, aged between 18 and 35 years as on 01 July 2026, with a minimum qualification of Intermediate, can apply.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for Anganwadi Karyakatri/Sahayika posts in Chandauli?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 25 July 2026, till midnight 12:00.

faq.question: Q4. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There are 84 vacancies for Anganwadi Karyakatri and 126 vacancies for Anganwadi Sahayika, totaling 210 posts, though the department has clarified that these numbers may change.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee. Candidates should check the application portal for confirmation.

faq.question: Q6. Where can I apply for UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications can be submitted only online through the official website upanganwadibharti.in. Offline applications are not accepted.

faq.question: Q7. Is age relaxation available for reserved categories?
faq.answer: No, the notification clearly states that no age relaxation is applicable to any caste category.
